characters.appearance: Young woman, fair complexion, blonde bob hair. Symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Beige blazer over a white top, delicate gold necklace.

characters.appearance: Young woman, tanned complexion, short curly brown hair. Prominent eyes and cheekbones.
characters.wardrobe: Black spaghetti strap top, gold hoop earrings, layered gold necklaces.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: That movie was amazing, right? [That movie was amazing, right?]
Character B says: Yes, I am agree! [Yes, I am agree!]
Character A says: Do you mean 'I agree'? [Do you mean 'I agree'?]
Character B says: Wait, 'am' नहीं लगेगा? [Wait, won't 'am' be used?]
Character A says: नहीं, 'agree' खुद एक verb है। हम सिर्फ 'I agree' बोलते हैं। [No, 'agree' is already a verb. We just say 'I agree'.]
Character B says: Got it. I agree कि मुझे और practice करनी चाहिए! [Got it. I agree that I should practice more!]
Character A says: Perfect. [Perfect.]
Character B says: काश कोई मुझे ऐसे ही हर बार correct करता। [I wish someone corrected me like that every time.]
Character A says: मैं कर सकती हूँ! मैं Supernova की AI tutor हूँ। [I can! I'm Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character B says: सच में? [Really?]
Character A says: हाँ, हम रोज़ बात कर सकते हैं, और मैं आपको confidently English बोलना सिखाऊंगी। [Yes, we can talk every day, and I'll help you speak English confidently.]
Character B says: That's great! कल फिर बात करते हैं। [That's great! Let's talk again tomorrow.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a highly relatable, common English grammar mistake ('I am agree').
- Demonstrates the app's core value proposition: gentle, real-time correction in a safe space.
- Introduces the AI tutor feature conversationally, positioning it as a supportive daily practice partner.

- Provides a clear call-to-action to download the app.
- Reinforces the brand name and core offering (AI English coach) in the user's native context.
